item.title: I ‘Can’t Afford a $50 Vet Visit for Every Minor Worry’ and I’m Running out of Funds for My Pets. What Should I Do?
item.description: Here's how often experts say to visit the vet, and what to do if you're having trouble affording those appointments.

item.title: IRS Delays: These Tax Returns and Refunds Are the Most Likely to Get Held Up in 2026
item.description: IRS backlogs and fewer workers mean some refunds could take weeks longer this tax season.

item.title: Dave Ramsey Hates Debt — But Here’s When a 0% Balance Transfer Can Save You
item.description: Here's what you need to know about balance transfer credit cards.

item.title: Current Mortgage Rates: February 16 to February 20, 2026
item.description: Mortgage rates are trending lower, although they remain slightly above 6%. Rates are expected to remain in their current range for the time being.
